title: Abacus AI Just Dropped AI SuperComputer With Claude And Gemini
summary: Abacus AI launched AI SuperComputer, a cloud platform enabling AI agents to build, deploy, and run software in Ubuntu environments with integrated databases, storage, GitHub, AWS, and HTTPS deployment. The platform bridges code generation and live deployment by providing real infrastructure for autonomous agents to execute and host applications.
